steps.catalog_description: Section heading with optional remarks (non-operational).
When true, skip to Setup Session.
Restore STS from sts/backups/.
Section heading with optional remarks (non-operational).
Advance session number by 1.
List #1 — morning: cars already in-train on D749 from prior Next Day. Print consist as-is.
steps.description: D749 Starting — in-train overnight consist (morning).

steps.catalog_description: Complete offline load/unload (allows correcting bad setouts before industry completion).

When unfilled (non-E) orders exceed Threshold, cancel unfilled orders down to Target so the generate max_unfilled gate can reopen. Keeps COKE-* orders by default. Choose Oldest first (stale backlog) or Newest first (drop recent surge).
steps.description: Parked: cancel 40→30 oldest_first before generate.

steps.catalog_description: Auto-generate car orders.
steps.description: COKE-CLEV-BULK + COKE-USS-BULK every session (both lanes).

steps.catalog_description: Auto-generate car orders.
Section heading with optional remarks (non-operational).
Reposition empty cars: send off-home cars home, or update with a chosen destination.
Auto-assign eligible cars to open orders (same as Fill Car Orders → Auto Assign). Uses car source checkboxes and optional order/car filters. Set Percent to limit how many orders are filled.
Render printable waybills for open waybills.
Section heading with optional remarks (non-operational).

Snapshot cars by station from the live database into this session's station report. Each call appends a new phase (Phase 1, Phase 2, …); optional Info labels the phase (like Train Info on switch lists). Station-report phases are numbered independently of wheel reports.
steps.description: Station report — Starting.

steps.catalog_description: Snapshot in-train / assigned cars from the live database into this session's wheel report. Each call appends a new phase (Phase 1, Phase 2, …); optional Info labels the phase. Wheel-report phases are numbered independently of station reports.
steps.description: Wheel report — Starting.

steps.catalog_description: Morning: D749 already holds overnight consist in-train. Print Starting, then set out to South Yard.

Set out cars from a job train. Choose Final Destination to spot each car at its loading or unloading location. Or pick a station / station-location to spot matching train cars there. Optional car filters match the Set Out Cars page. Leave job and location blank for all locals.
Section heading with optional remarks (non-operational).

Assign eligible cars to selected job(s)/train(s). Hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple. Optional station filter limits to cars currently at one yard; optional destination filter limits to cars bound for a station/location (same tokens as Pickup final dest). Prefer destination-scoped assigns + Pick Up all over filtered pickups.
Print CK1 before D749; South reload setout comes after D749 Starting.
Pick up assigned cars onto a job train. Optional car filters match the Pick Up Cars page. Leave job blank for all locals (staging excluded).

Set out cars from a job train. Choose Final Destination to spot each car at its loading or unloading location. Or pick a station / station-location to spot matching train cars there. Optional car filters match the Set Out Cars page. Leave job and location blank for all locals.
Pick up assigned cars onto a job train. Optional car filters match the Pick Up Cars page. Leave job blank for all locals (staging excluded).

Recalibrate the coke track scale. Performs a fresh random calibration when required (first use / out of service) or when the configured number of sessions have elapsed since the last calibration. Set to 1 to calibrate every session (steady ~15% reload routing); higher values let scale drift accumulate so more cars route to reload between calibrations. Run this before the Track Scale weigh step.
Weigh loaded cars on a job train (or at the scale) for the selected commodity. Uses track scale config when commodity is blank.
Section heading with optional remarks (non-operational).
Weighed coke lands at South after D749 Starting — reload order is a surprise.
Morning yard turn: assign at Scully, print Outbound, pick up, set out South. Does not begin the session already in-train.

Assign eligible cars to selected job(s)/train(s). Hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple. Optional station filter limits to cars currently at one yard; optional destination filter limits to cars bound for a station/location (same tokens as Pickup final dest). Prefer destination-scoped assigns + Pick Up all over filtered pickups.
steps.description: Assign NVL at Scully Yard for Neville Island, Shenango, South, McKeesport, Demmler.

steps.catalog_description: NVL Outbound — print assigned cars at Scully ready for pick-up (still in yard). Not an overnight in-train start (only D749 Starting is).
steps.description: NVL Outbound — switchlist before pick-up.

steps.catalog_description: Pick up all assigned NVL cars at SCULLY-YARD.

Set out cars from a job train. Choose Final Destination to spot each car at its loading or unloading location. Or pick a station / station-location to spot matching train cars there. Optional car filters match the Set Out Cars page. Leave job and location blank for all locals.
steps.description: Drop McKeesport / Demmler / South Yard cars at South.

steps.catalog_description: Section heading with optional remarks (non-operational).

Assign eligible cars to selected job(s)/train(s). Hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple. Optional station filter limits to cars currently at one yard; optional destination filter limits to cars bound for a station/location (same tokens as Pickup final dest). Prefer destination-scoped assigns + Pick Up all over filtered pickups.
steps.description: Assign South Yard after NVL McKeesport/Demmler drops + CK1 surprise reload.

steps.catalog_description: Generate printable switch lists for selected jobs.
steps.description: D749 Outbound — after NVL South drops.

steps.catalog_description: Pick up assigned cars onto a job train. Optional car filters match the Pick Up Cars page. Leave job blank for all locals (staging excluded).

Set out cars from a job train. Choose Final Destination to spot each car at its loading or unloading location. Or pick a station / station-location to spot matching train cars there. Optional car filters match the Set Out Cars page. Leave job and location blank for all locals.
Return: finish NI/Shenango (and leftover South→island) setouts, then assign homebound at NI/Shenango/South, snap Return (yard From), pick up all three, set out Scully.
Set out remaining NVL cars at Final Destination (clear the train before Return assigns / snap).
steps.description: Set out Island and Shenango deliveries at Final Destination.

steps.catalog_description: Assign remaining Island/Shenango deliveries still at South Yard (finish these setouts before Return homebound assigns).
steps.description: Assign NVL at South Yard for remaining Island/Shenango deliveries (before Return list).

steps.catalog_description: Pick up remaining Island/Shenango deliveries at South Yard.
Set out remaining NVL cars at Final Destination (clear the train before Return assigns / snap).
steps.description: Set out Island and Shenango deliveries at Final Destination.

steps.catalog_description: Assign eligible cars to selected job(s)/train(s). Hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple. Optional station filter limits to cars currently at one yard; optional destination filter limits to cars bound for a station/location (same tokens as Pickup final dest). Prefer destination-scoped assigns + Pick Up all over filtered pickups.
steps.description: Assign NVL at Neville Island for island respots plus Scully, McKees Rocks, McKeesport, Demmler.

steps.catalog_description: Assign eligible cars to selected job(s)/train(s). Hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple. Optional station filter limits to cars currently at one yard; optional destination filter limits to cars bound for a station/location (same tokens as Pickup final dest). Prefer destination-scoped assigns + Pick Up all over filtered pickups.
steps.description: Assign NVL at Shenango for Scully and McKees Rocks.

steps.catalog_description: Assign NVL at South Yard for homebound (Scully/MR/CSX) — not island deliveries.
steps.description: Assign NVL at South Yard for homebound (Scully/MR/CSX) — not island deliveries.

steps.catalog_description: NVL Return — print assigned cars still at NI / Shenango / South (yard 'From', not in-train). Snap after delivery setouts, before pickups.
steps.description: NVL Return — switchlist before pickups (after NI/Shenango setouts).

steps.catalog_description: Pick up all assigned NVL cars at Neville Island.

Set out cars from a job train. Choose Final Destination to spot each car at its loading or unloading location. Or pick a station / station-location to spot matching train cars there. Optional car filters match the Set Out Cars page. Leave job and location blank for all locals.
steps.description: NVL Return — final-dest setout after Neville PU (island respots) before homebound Shenango/South pulls.

steps.catalog_description: Pick up all assigned NVL cars at SHEN-COKE-SHIPPING.
Pick up assigned cars onto a job train.
steps.description: Pick up Island/Shenango deliveries at South.

steps.catalog_description: Set out cars from a job train. Choose Final Destination to spot each car at its loading or unloading location. Or pick a station / station-location to spot matching train cars there. Optional car filters match the Set Out Cars page. Leave job and location blank for all locals.

steps.description: Assign STG-DEMMLER (all stations, including McKeesport).

steps.catalog_description: Print Demmler staging cars as D749 Starting (title override consolidates under D749).
steps.description: D749 Starting — STG-DEMMLER cars printed under D749.

steps.catalog_description: Pick up assigned cars onto a job train. Optional car filters match the Pick Up Cars page. Leave job blank for all locals (staging excluded).
Only McKeesport industry deliveries — Final Destination.
Yard-ready cars for D749 at Demmler (not FD to Island/South).
Section heading with optional remarks (non-operational).

Assign eligible cars to selected job(s)/train(s). Hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple. Optional station filter limits to cars currently at one yard; optional destination filter limits to cars bound for a station/location (same tokens as Pickup final dest). Prefer destination-scoped assigns + Pick Up all over filtered pickups.
Print Scully staging cars as NVL Outbound (title override consolidates under NVL).
steps.description: NVL Outbound — STG-SCULLY cars printed under NVL.

steps.catalog_description: Pick up assigned cars onto a job train. Optional car filters match the Pick Up Cars page. Leave job blank for all locals (staging excluded).
Only McKees Rocks industry work — Final Destination.
Park Island/Shenango/South/McKeesport-bound at Scully for NVL — never FD to Island.
Overnight bookend for D749 only (assign → print Next Day at yard → pick up in-train). NVL is not overnighted in-train.

Assign eligible cars to selected job(s)/train(s). Hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple. Optional station filter limits to cars currently at one yard; optional destination filter limits to cars bound for a station/location (same tokens as Pickup final dest). Prefer destination-scoped assigns + Pick Up all over filtered pickups.
List #3 — overnight; matches next session D749 Starting after L/U.
Pick up assigned cars onto a job train. Optional car filters match the Pick Up Cars page. Leave job blank for all locals (staging excluded).
Section heading with optional remarks (non-operational).

Snapshot cars by station from the live database into this session's station report. Each call appends a new phase (Phase 1, Phase 2, …); optional Info labels the phase (like Train Info on switch lists). Station-report phases are numbered independently of wheel reports.
steps.description: Station report — End of session.

steps.catalog_description: Snapshot in-train / assigned cars from the live database into this session's wheel report. Each call appends a new phase (Phase 1, Phase 2, …); optional Info labels the phase. Wheel-report phases are numbered independently of station reports.
steps.description: Wheel report — End of session.

steps.catalog_description: Section heading with optional remarks (non-operational).

Export current DB to sts/backups/{prefix}{session_nbr} and copy RollingStock photos to {prefix}{session_nbr}_photos. Overwrites any prior dump with that name. Use a stable prefix (e.g. hart_session) so each session writes hart_session1, hart_session2, … Lock from the session overview for a static *_locked checkpoint.
steps.description: End-of-session dump as hart_session{N} (+ photos).
